race.comment: FUN EFFECTS (6) settled down midfield and held her position to the line when finishing 4th (17.73) at this track. Tough to beat if on-song. AMAZING BUNDY (2) has a strong record this track and trip with three wins and two placings from eight starts. Was out of the placings last time (16.96) at Q Straight in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 4 lengths. Among the main chances. BIG CUTIE (8) was responsible for a modest effort most recently when sixth at this track over 300m behind Beautiful Banter (18.08) in a Grade 5. Scored at her previous run. Expected to feature in the finish. WONDER KID (1) should bounce back after an unplaced effort here recently. Something for the Multiples: KINGSBRAE MAGGIE (4)

runners.name: Peta Zoom
runners.owners: J Carter & J Brown - Mgr J Carter
